title: Calendar Disabled Dates
description: Defines the type for specifying dates that should be disabled in calendar components, preventing user selection of those dates.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Disable dates by list or predicate.

props.name: Date[]
props.description: An array of Date objects representing specific dates that should be disabled in the calendar.

props.name: function
props.description: A function that takes a Date parameter and returns a boolean indicating whether that date should be disabled.
